title: CrewAI
description: Can be invoked as a tool (`<nodeId>.run_agent`) for hierarchical agent orchestration.

tool.description: Tools available to the agent (via control-plane invoke)

agent_description.title: Agent description
agent_description.description: What does this agent do? Describe its purpose and capabilities — this helps parent agents select and invoke it correctly.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide the agent.

role.title: Role
role.description: Short role name for this agent when used in a CrewAI Orchestrator pipeline (e.g. 'Financial Analyst').

task_description.title: Task
task_description.description: What this agent should do when used in a CrewAI Orchestrator pipeline. If blank, the incoming question is used.

goal.title: Goal
goal.description: What this agent is trying to achieve. Leave blank to use the default.

backstory.title: Backstory
backstory.description: Background context for this agent's persona. Leave blank to use the default.

expected_output.title: Expected Output
expected_output.description: Description of the expected output format. Leave blank to use the default.

max_iter.title: Max Iterations
max_iter.description: Maximum agent iterations before forced stop. 0 uses the framework default (25).

shape.title: Settings when used in a CrewAI Orchestrator pipeline
